home.hero_title: Every road tells a story. Yours remembers them all.
home.hero_subtitle: TripTrack silently records every drive, building a beautiful visual diary of your roads.
home.hero_note: Free forever · No account needed · Your data stays on your phone
home.problem_timeline_desc: Google deleted years of location history in 2025. Millions lost their travel memories overnight.
home.problem_photos_desc: You scroll through camera roll and think 'where was that road?' Photos don't capture the journey, only the stops.
home.problem_noapp_desc: Polarsteps is for vacations. MileIQ is for taxes. Nothing exists for your everyday drives and weekend trips.
home.step1_desc: Tap one button before you drive. Or set it to auto-start.
home.step2_desc: Live on your Lock Screen. Switch to your navigator, we keep recording.
home.step3_desc: See your trip: route, photos, stats. Every drive becomes a memory.
home.review1: "Приложение огонь. Люблю разные трекеры. Этот показался интересным, слежу за ним теперь."

features.hero_subtitle: Built to be the ultimate companion for your drives. From everyday commutes to cross-country expeditions.
features.records_desc: Seamlessly tracks your routes in the background. Speed, distance, elevation—all captured without draining your battery.
features.photos_desc: Attach memories exactly where they happened on the map.
features.stats_desc: Analyze your driving habits, favorite routes, and top speeds.
features.fog_desc: Explore the world like a game. Reveal the map with every kilometer. See exactly where you've been and what's left to discover.
features.private_desc: Your data never leaves your device. No cloud. No accounts.
features.gamification_title: Your car. Your roads. Your story.
features.gamification_desc: Level up your virtual garage, earn badges for epic road trips, and collect stickers for every milestone you hit.
features.gamification_note: 30 driver levels · 10 vehicle stickers · Hidden achievements

about.story_p1: I started building TripTrack after Google killed years of my location history in early 2025. I wanted to look back at that spontaneous weekend trip to the mountains, the scenic coastal drive I took last summer, or the route I drove cross-country.
about.story_p2: There were apps for hardcore athletes tracking their heart rate on a hike. There were apps for vacation itineraries. There was nothing designed for simple, everyday driving and road trips. So I built the digital photo album I always wanted for my roads.
about.private_desc: Your data stays on YOUR phone. No cloud. No servers. No ads. TripTrack works completely offline. I never see your routes.
about.indie_desc: Not a VC-backed startup trying to sell your location data. Just an indie developer building a tool they love to use.

download.hero_subtitle: Download TripTrack free from the App Store. No accounts, no subscriptions to track your basic trips. Just start driving.

footer.made_with: Made with ❤️ and 71,000 km behind the wheel
